title: equipmentsBase
description: Shema of data structure for the equipments that the characters can equip in battleScissor

Value.description: The vpower value of this equipment

Restriction.description: Other kind of restriction to equip this equipment

Strength.description: The bonus Strength provided by the equipment

Intelligence.description: The bonus Intelligence provided by the equipment

Constitution.description: The bonus Constitution provided by the equipment

Charisma.description: The bonus Charisma provided by the equipment

Dexterity.description: The bonus Dexterity provided by the equipment

Agility.description: The bonus Agility provided by the equipment

Perception.description: The bonus Perception provided by the equipment

Power.description: The bonus Power provided by the equipment

DefenseRange.description: The bonus Defense Range provided by the equipment

DefenseMelee.description: The bonus Defense Melee provided by the equipment

ResPhysical.description: The bonus Resistance in Physical damage provided by the equipment

ResChi.description: The bonus resistance againt Chi damage provided by the equipment

DamChi.description: The bonus damage in psykic type provided by the equipment

ResFire.description: The bonus resistance against fire damage provided by the equipment

DamFire.description: The bonus damage in fire type provided by the equipment

ResLightning.description: The bonus resistance against lightning damage provided by the equipment

DamLightning.description: The bonus damage in lightning type provided by the equipment

ResIce.description: The bonus resistance against ice damage provided by the passive

DamIce.description: The bonus damage in lightning type provided by the passive

ResMental.description: The bonus resistance against mental damage provided by the equipment

DamMental.description: The bonus damage in mental type provided by the equipment

WeaponType.description: Describe the type of weapon, in case a bonus is provided to a specific weapon type

WeaponDamageBonus.description: The bonus damage provided by the equipment to a specific weapon type

WeaponPrecisionBonus.description: The bonus precision provided by the equipment to a specific weapon type

PrecisionRange.description: The bonus Precision in range attack provided by the equipment

PrecisionMelee.description: The bonus precision in melee attack provided by the equipment

HitPoint.description: The bonus HitPoint provided by the equipment

Mana.description: The bonus Mana provided by the equipment

Movement.description: The bonus Movement provided by the equipment

Initiative.description: The bonus Initiative provided by the equipment

Nature.description: The bonus Hacking provided by the equipment

Magic.description: The bonus in magic knowledge provided by the equipment

Demonic.description: The bonus in demonic knowledge provided by the equipment

Medecine.description: The bonus in medical knowledge provided by the equipment

Cooking.description: The bonus in cooking provided by the equipment

Forge.description: The bonus in cooking provided by the equipment

Stealth.description: The bonus Stealth provided by the equipment

OtherEffect.description: Other effect of the equipment, such as bonus to a specific skill or ability

otherEffectValue.description: Other effect of the equipment, such as bonus to a specific skill or ability
